properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 84/23
 FROM 290001UTC JUN 23 TO 022359UTC AUG 23 M/V RAMFORM VICTORY IS CONDUCTING SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS AND TOWING 9 STREAMERS AT 6NM  LENGTH 1NM WITH IN AREA BOUNDED BY: 

 A. 67-19.3N 006-28.0E.
 B. 67-30.2N 006-05.7E.
 C. 67-11.0N 004-26.7E.
 D. 66-52.8N 004-13.6E.
 E. 66-38.0N 003-02.1E.
 F. 66-17.0N 003-49.0E.
 G. 66-43.0N 006-12.4E.
 H. 67-07.2N 005-21.4E.

 WIDE BERTH REQUESTED, MINIMUM 7NM ASTERN AND 3 MILES ABEAM.
 SURVEY VESSEL STANDING BY ON VHF CH 08 AND 16.
 GUARD VESSEL M/V 7-STARS AND M/V TESS IN ATTENDANCE.
